use std::fs;
use std::path::Path;

pub struct Config {
    pub database_url: String,
    pub max_connections: u32,
}

pub fn load_config(path: &Path) -> Config {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path).expect("failed to read config file");
    let parsed: toml::Value = toml::from_str(&contents).expect("invalid TOML in config");
    let url = parsed["database"]["url"]
        .as_str()
        .expect("missing database.url")
        .to_string();
    let max_conn = parsed["database"]["max_connections"]
        .as_integer()
        .expect("missing max_connections") as u32;
    Config {
        database_url: url,
        max_connections: max_conn,
    }
}

pub fn init_logger() {
    tracing_subscriber::fmt()
        .with_env_filter("info")
        .try_init()
        .expect("failed to init logger");
}
